features.evidence: Beautiful screen. Immedietly took the phone, slapped a tempered glass screen protector and case on it and it is basically brand new.
Battery and functionality is perfect. The battery life is robust, and all functionalities are fully operational.
if you can get this one for 4-5 hundred off retail, it's a great value. I was worried I'd need to repair the phone which would cost more than it's worth,
Performance is flawless so far. All features are fully operational, and I have no reservations or concerns regarding its performance.

The few issues I had with my old note 10 lite I had for 5 years are solved (the in-screen fingerprint reader was iffy, especially in sunlight, and the lack of stereo speakers was annoying... after years of that you really notice the difference in the ultra).
The one and only complaint is this phone is kind of a tank in size and weight, especially with a case and screen protector which I of course use because my phone does get some abuse here and there.
